[Mini Event Notice]

The "Balancing Schale's Books with the General Student Council" Mini Event is back! Earn enhancement materials and tons of Credits!

🗓️Schedule: 1/9 (Tue) After Maintenance – 1/23 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
